title: WynDEx Warfare
description:
This modpack covers almost all of your needs you can program contraptions with computer craft

you can make contraptions with create mod, you can make planes with clockwork you can make cars and tanks with trackwork and lastly (creativity has no limits)
body:
This ModPack is based on my WynDEx Warfare MC Server  Which is about  Endless Possibilities Tanks,Planes,Trains and much more Chaotic Things You Name it


This Modpack Includes:

create mod

vs2 (dependencies)

create ender transmission 

vs clockwork

vs trackwork

computer craft

and many more mods

This modpack covers almost all of your needs you can program contraptions with computer craft

you can make contraptions with create mod, you can make planes with clockwork you can make cars and tanks with trackwork and lastly (creativity has no limits)
